sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75456" key="o)/rfios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὄρφιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n75456.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made of</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὀρφώς, ἴσικος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:7:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.8</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:11:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
